title: Jappa's First Textures
description: This resourcepack features first ever designs of blocks made by Jappa in 1.13-1.14 and some modern sketch designs from Minecons.
body:
![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4bbdd936e1571f67162d14686fe09b2cde35075a.png)
Old 1.14 Obsidian texture
Old Planks texture
Spyglass
Brush (From minecon preview)
Old Map
Old 1.14 Glass texture (only default one)

_There are changes in more blocks and mobs which i haven't listed there._
